description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, build-and-test and release, global variables CLJ_CONFIG=./config/ci and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive, and a cache of .m2/repository. In the build-and-test stage add a build job that uses the clojure:tools-deps-1.9.0.391-alpine image, runs the before_script `apk --update add make nodejs-npm`, then executes `make compile`, and runs on runners tagged docker. Also in the build-and-test stage add a test job that uses the same clojure image, runs before_script `apk --update add make nodejs-npm yarn` and `yarn add websocket`, then runs `make test`, also on docker tags. In the release stage add a release job that uses the maven:3-jdk-8-alpine image, runs before_script `apk --update add make`, sets variables MAVEN_CLI_OPTS='-s .m2/settings.xml --batch-mode' and MAVEN_OPTS='-Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/repository', executes the script lines `export RELEASE_VERSION=$(if [[ "${CI_COMMIT_TAG}" = v* ]]; then echo "${CI_COMMIT_TAG#v}";else echo "${CI_COMMIT_TAG#pre}-SNAPSHOT";fi)`, `echo "Releasing ${RELEASE_VERSION}"`, and `make mvn-deploy version="${RELEASE_VERSION}" tag="${CI_COMMIT_TAG}"`, only runs on tag pipelines, and stores pom.xml as an artifact.
